description: A reader should fail sync when the seed replaces advertised heads and then sends the withdrawn root revision OBJECT after its pending request was cleared.

assertions.description: Reader rejects the withdrawn root OBJECT because replace=true cleared the old pending request before that object arrived again.
Reader does not keep writing the stale sync state after the withdrawn root OBJECT violation.

notes: Extends the simulator matrix with a post-HELLO pending-state invalidation fault after root replacement.
The harness keeps the normal peer-store transcript but injects replacement HEADS plus a replayed stale root OBJECT before BYE.
